name: @forgeax/bevy-translation
description: Reproduction of Bevy's `translation` example (a cube sliding back and forth along its own local X axis) — a MOTION demo exercising createApp's managed frame-loop + auto-Time resource + a world.addSystem Update system driving quat.right, the new local-basis accessor mapping Bevy's transform.local_x().

bundle-size.reason: vite app bundle downstream of engine-runtime sizes already tracked at the package level

fps.reason: translation demo; fps no-regression covered by hello-cube / hello-room gates

bench.reason: translation demo; bench focus on engine-math / pixel-parity

spike-report.reason: not a spike app; Bevy translation reproduction
